query:
-- 检查COL材料分类
SELECT mb.id, mb.erpCompanyId, mb.boardNumber, mb.boardName, mb.supplierId, ms.code as supplierCode
FROM material_boards mb
LEFT JOIN material_suppliers ms ON mb.supplierId = ms.id
WHERE mb.boardNumber = 'COL';

-- 检查ORIG颜色
SELECT mc.id, mc.erpCompanyId, mc.colorCode, mc.colorName, mc.boardId, mb.boardNumber
FROM material_colors mc
LEFT JOIN material_boards mb ON mc.boardId = mb.id
WHERE mc.colorCode = 'ORIG';

-- 检查COL材料分类
SELECT mb.id, mb.erpCompanyId, mb.boardNumber, mb.boardName, mb.supplierId, ms.code as supplierCode
FROM material_boards mb
LEFT JOIN material_suppliers ms ON mb.supplierId = ms.id
WHERE mb.boardNumber = 'COL';

-- 检查ORIG颜色
SELECT mc.id, mc.erpCompanyId, mc.colorCode, mc.colorName, mc.boardId, mb.boardNumber
FROM material_colors mc
LEFT JOIN material_boards mb ON mc.boardId = mb.id
WHERE mc.colorCode = 'ORIG';
